name: @ttsc/station
description: Standalone TypeScript-Go compiler and runtime workspace.

scripts.experimental: pnpm --dir experimental/install start -- --pack-current && pnpm --dir experimental/test-unplugin start -- --skip-pack
scripts.package:latest: pnpm build && pnpm --filter=./packages/* --filter=!ttsc -r publish --tag latest --access public --no-git-checks --provenance && pnpm --filter ttsc publish --tag latest --access public --no-git-checks --provenance
scripts.test: pnpm run build:current && pnpm run test:typecheck && node scripts/test-go-transformer.cjs && node scripts/test-go-lint.cjs && node scripts/test-go-ttsc-utility-plugins.cjs && pnpm run test:features
scripts.test:features: pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-api start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-project start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-source-plugin start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-platform start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-tsgo start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-go start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-compiler start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-plugin start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-native-transformer start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsx-runtime start && pnpm --dir tests/test-ttsc-utility-plugins start && pnpm --dir tests/test-unplugin-adapters start && pnpm --dir tests/test-unplugin-transform start && pnpm --dir tests/test-lint-plugin start && pnpm --dir tests/test-lint-config start && pnpm --dir tests/test-lint-rules start

author: Jeongho Nam
